sentences.arabic: خَرَجَ عَلِيٌّ يَبْحَثُ عَنْ عَمَلٍ فِي الصَّيْفِ.
sentences.translation: Ali je izašao u potrazi za ljetnim poslom.
sentences.translationEn: Ali went out looking for a summer job.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ عَمَلًا فِي مَحَلِّ بَقَالَةٍ قَرِيبٍ مِنَ الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Pronašao je posao u prodavnici blizu kuće.
sentences.translationEn: He found a job in a grocery store near his house.

sentences.arabic: عَمِلَ بِجِدٍّ وَصَاحِبُ الْمَحَلِّ كَانَ رَاضِيًا عَنْهُ.
sentences.translation: Radio je marljivo i vlasnik radnje je bio zadovoljan njime.
sentences.translationEn: He worked hard and the shop owner was satisfied with him.

sentences.arabic: جَمَعَ عَلِيٌّ مَالًا كَثِيرًا وَاشْتَرَى كِتَابًا لِلدِّرَاسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ali je zaradio mnogo novca i kupio udžbenik.
sentences.translationEn: Ali saved a lot of money and bought a study book.
